design_plan: rng=42; AIDA pass; hero max-width math ~1120px for 2–3 lines; dense bento uses grid-auto-flow:dense; all competitors label sweep complete; CTA contrast checked (black/white pills); evidence cited; animations guarded.
headline: Super for real estate agents managing follow‑ups, listings, and scheduling

site_brief.audience: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling AI assistant
real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page that uses Super’s comparison‑page visual system to show how a personal AI agent with real computer control — and a reusable computer‑use cache — removes the daily follow‑up, listing, and scheduling grind for real estate agents. Grounded in 2026 market evidence on agentic AI and real estate workflows, and fairly positioned against ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Siri, Folk, and Orchids.
